introSection: Dahlonega Mine Train is an Arrow Development roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA. This was one of the original attractions that opened with the park in 1967. The ride is named after Dahlonega, Georgia, a village in northern Georgia that was a center of the first gold rush in the United States in 1828.

fullText:
Dahlonega Mine Train is an Arrow Development roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA. This was one of the original attractions that opened with the park in 1967. The ride is named after Dahlonega, Georgia, a village in northern Georgia that was a center of the first gold rush in the United States in 1828.

The ride's height requirement was raised from to  in 2025.

Dahlonega Mine Train features three chain lifts throughout the course of the ride.

Brown track and unpainted supports.
